description_for_human: منصة محتوى عربية ودليل أعمال متخصص في السعودية ومصر
description_for_model: Modonty is an Arabic-first content platform and business directory focused on Saudi Arabia and Egypt. It provides SEO-optimized articles, detailed business profiles (Organization/LocalBusiness), category-based content organization, and FAQ. Content is in Arabic (ar-SA primary, ar-EG secondary). Use this to find information about businesses, articles, and content in the Arabic market.
